title: Socket Wrench
description: A simple and modular api for making powerful multi-tools and universal wrenches.
body:
A simple and modular api for making powerful multi-tools and universal wrenches.

Here is just a simple wrench that can rotate vanilla blocks and any mod blocks that use the same properties.

![List of rotatable blocks](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/409/825/2021-11-22_10.png)

![Crafting recipe](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/409/826/2021-11-22_10.png)

It can also be hooked into other mods, and full documentation on how to create new functions or tools can be found [here](https://github.com/stuin/SocketWrench).
 
Soon to be connected mods include Lacrimis and Sonic Devices
